heading: ### 💬 Chat — unified assistant
summary: Talk to the CEO agent directly; it decomposes goals and routes work to the right specialists.

heading: ### 📊 Dashboard — system overview
summary: Live agent health, recent activity, and system metrics at a glance.

heading: ### 🗂 Tasks — job lifecycle board
summary: Every AI job made visible: waiting, running, blocked, in review, or done.

heading: ### 🤖 Agents — autonomous team
summary: Your specialist roster — each with its own model, runtime, specialty, and guardrails.

heading: ### ⚡ Skills — agentic capabilities
summary: Reusable runtime skills bound to specialists.

heading: ### 🎯 Portfolio — WSJF roadmap
summary: Prioritised initiatives, sprints, and agile health.

heading: ### 📈 Intelligence — trends & competitors
summary: Trend and competitor signals scoped to each onboarded company's stack.

heading: ### 📚 Knowledge — docs & sources
summary: Wiki pages, source material, and reusable context — your team's memory.

heading: ### 🔌 Providers — models, Ollama & MCP
summary: Connect free/cloud/local AI sources and choose which models are available.

heading: ### 🔭 Logs — traces & observability
summary: Every LLM call: tokens, latency, cost, and decision context.

heading: ### 🐙 GitHub — repos & PRs
summary: Connect repositories and manage the agent's delivery surface.

heading: ### 🏢 Company — operating context
summary: An onboarded company's detected stack, systems, and SEO/health.

heading: ### ✨ Onboarding — setup wizard
summary: Scan a website and stand up its specialist agency in minutes.

heading: ### 🔁 Loops — autonomous fleet
summary: Every autonomous loop catalogued: readiness score, maturity, self-heal coverage, drift status, and cost estimate.

heading: ### 🩺 Doctor — diagnostics
summary: System self-checks and autonomy readiness probes.

heading: ### 🛡 Admin — users & access
summary: Manage users, roles, instance activation, and onboarding gates.

heading: ### 📱 Mobile
summary: Responsive layout — sign in, view the dashboard, and work the task board from a phone.
